Modern Matchmaking
For Busy Professionals

A modern matchmaking service for professionals in the UK, combining personality compatibility with curated introductions.

✓ Personality-based matching ✓ Curated introductions ✓ UK-wide professional network

How It Works

Dating apps aren't built for depth - or for busy, intentional people. We've designed a thoughtful process that respects your time while maximising your chances of finding a meaningful, lasting connection.

Our network grows through trusted referrals and our events, giving you access to a community of like-minded singles.

Step 01

Create Your Profile

Complete our in-depth personality assessment. We'll learn about your values, lifestyle, and what you're truly looking for in a partner.

Step 02

Meet Your Matchmaker

Have a personal consultation with our matchmaker who will get to know you and understand your relationship goals.

Step 03

Get Matched

Our blend of AI compatibility analysis and human insight identifies your most compatible matches based on personality, values, and lifestyle.

Step 04

Start Connecting

Receive guided introductions and enjoy the journey of meeting genuinely compatible people who share your values and intentions.

Know a great single?

We'd love to meet them!

Refer someone

A Different Approach to Finding Love

Sparked Connection was founded on the belief that meaningful relationships deserve more than swipes and algorithms. We combine the art of traditional matchmaking with scientifically validated personality assessments and modern social events, creating genuine opportunities for love to flourish.

Personalised Matching

Your matchmaker takes time to understand your values, lifestyle, and relationship goals to find truly compatible partners.

Curated Community

Every member is personally vetted to ensure a community of genuine, relationship-minded professionals.

Safe & Private

Your privacy is paramount. We maintain strict confidentiality and GDPR-compliant processes for a secure experience.

Exclusive Events

From intimate dinner parties to adventure trips, our events create natural opportunities for chemistry to spark.

Plans

High-quality matchmaking - without the traditional high price tag.

We are a modern alternative to traditional luxury matchmaking - by combining smart technology with a lean, modern structure, we deliver high-quality matchmaking without the inflated overheads of traditional agencies.

1 Get 1 free match when you refer a friend through the 'Referral' link above.

2 Free & paid in-person and online events. Subject to availability.

3 Bespoke Search - Real World search (beyond our Network).

4 All free and paid in-person and online events.

5 VIP Access offers advance alerts on compatible matches attending the event. Access to free and paid in-person and online events.

*If minimum number of introductions are not met in the membership period, the membership will be extended at no cost (see T&Cs).

Memberships are also available as gift vouchers (request via email).
